# jrs8205 — Developer

> Personal site of jrs8205, a developer building open-source Android apps,
> Windows tools, Shopify themes and Pebble watchfaces.
> GitHub: https://github.com/jrs8205

## Projects

- [ARK-launcher](https://github.com/jrs8205/ARK-launcher): A modern open-source Android launcher built with Jetpack Compose and Material 3. Customizable and bilingual (English/Finnish).
- [Computer-App](https://github.com/jrs8205/Computer-App): Windows 11 hardware monitor with plain-language logging, risk analysis, post-crash forensics and a machine-readable insights file. WPF / .NET 8.
- [Device-Watch](https://github.com/jrs8205/Device-Watch): Fully offline Android device monitor with a home-screen widget, per-app usage insights and a charging screensaver. No internet permission.
- [BetaScout](https://github.com/jrs8205/BetaScout): Finds and tracks Google Play beta programs for your installed Android apps.
- [Valor-Theme](https://github.com/jrs8205/Valor-Theme): Premium Shopify Online Store 2.0 theme for fashion, jewelry and accessories brands.
- [Aikapaneeli](https://github.com/jrs8205/aikapaneeli): Finnish-language watchface for Pebble Time 2 with steps, battery and dynamic colors.
- [More repositories](https://github.com/jrs8205?tab=repositories)

## Other sites

- [AlfaJewelry](https://alfajewelry.com/): A collection of premium jewelry brand domain names available for purchase, with matching EU and Finnish trademarks.
- [Valor Theme](https://valortheme.com/): Free premium Shopify theme built for brands where presentation matters — jewelry, accessories, fashion, watches and beauty.
- [Arkikeskus](https://arkikeskus.com/): Free, ad-free Finnish Android app that brings weather, news, transit, traffic and electricity prices into one view.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/jrs8205
